info.name: Cellulant Tingg Checkout API
info.description:
Tingg Checkout 3.0 — accept payments across 25+ African markets through
a single integration. Supports Express Checkout (hosted/modal) and Custom
Checkout (host-to-host) for mobile money, cards, and direct bank transfer.


Contact Support:
 Name: Cellulant Developer Support
 Email: developer@cellulant.io

request.description: Exchange clientId, clientSecret, and apiKey for a bearer access token used to authorize subsequent Tingg API requests.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) Merchant API key issued in the Tingg integration dashboard.

request.description: Create a hosted checkout session. The response includes both short_url and long_url that the merchant can present to the end-user (use short_url to avoid truncation in SMS or WhatsApp).

header.description: (Required) Merchant API key issued in the Tingg integration dashboard.

request.description: Initiate a host-to-host checkout where the merchant collects payment details and posts them to Tingg directly, retaining control of the UX.

request.description: Post a charge request to debit the customer for an initiated custom checkout. Used to push USSD/STK prompts or card charges from the merchant's backend.
